Title: Voice or text interaction
User Story: As a user, I want to interact with the assistant using voice or text, so that I can communicate in the way that is most convenient.

Title: Screen viewing with permission
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to see what is on my screen (with permission), so that it can provide help based on my current context.

Title: Screen summary support
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to describe or summarize what is on my screen, so that I can quickly understand complex or unfamiliar content.

Title: Contextual Q&A on screen content
User Story: As a user, I want to ask questions about something currently visible on my screen, so that I can receive contextual help without copying and pasting.

Title: Reminder creation
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to create reminders for me, so that I do not forget important tasks.

Title: Calendar event management
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to create, edit, and delete calendar events (with permission), so that I can manage my schedule more efficiently.

Title: Open applications
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to open applications for me, so that I can launch tools quickly or hands-free.

Title: In-app basic actions
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to perform basic actions within apps it has permission to use, so that I can save time on repetitive tasks.

Title: Timers and alarms
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to set timers and alarms, so that I can manage my time effectively.

Title: App control permissions
User Story: As a user, I want to choose which applications the assistant is allowed to control, so that I feel safe about what it can access.

Title: Toggle screen viewing
User Story: As a user, I want to enable or disable the assistant’s screen viewing at any time, so that I remain in control of my privacy.

Title: Action confirmation
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to confirm before performing important actions, so that mistakes can be prevented.

Title: Preference learning
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to learn my preferences over time, so that it becomes more personalized and helpful.

Title: Proactive suggestions
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to suggest helpful actions based on what I am doing, so that I can be more productive.

Title: Session task/context memory
User Story: As a user, I want the assistant to remember tasks and context during a session, so that I do not need to repeat information.
